headline: Meta Compute Could Trigger a 'Butterfly Effect' in AI Infrastructure — and Fuel a Mag 7 Bounce, Trader Says
summary: Meta Platforms Inc.’s reported AI cloud plans spark a "butterfly effect" sell-off in neocloud stocks like Nebius and CoreWeave while backing the MAGS bounce case.

headline: Dow Hits Record, Meta Soars On AI-Cloud Bet: Stock Market Today
summary: The Dow set a record and software surged, but a 4.5% semiconductor rout sank the Nasdaq 100 as Meta jumped on a plan to sell AI compute.
